tracks.meaning: a level or even surface without hills, ridges, or other irregularities
the sole of the foot or a flat part of the body
a musical note that is lowered in pitch by one semitone, indicated by the symbol ♭
a residential apartment or dwelling unit
a shallow open container or tray for holding items
a piece of movable scenery or canvas stretched on a wooden frame used as a stage set
to make something level or even by pressing or smoothing it
the state of being stretched out at full length on a surface
a race or competition run on level ground without jumps or obstacles
lacking wind or breeze; calm or still
having no money; broke or financially depleted
having no variation or difference in level or value across a surface or range
absolute or definitive without qualification or negotiation
denoting a fixed rate or price that does not change over a period
a categorical or outright denial or rejection without explanation
shallow or having little water depth
a type of bread or cake that has not risen properly during baking
a display screen or monitor with a thin design
an area of uniform color or tone without shading or gradation
a fixed or unchanging price or rate of exchange
